svg.text: Ardalis Clean Architecture · .NET 10 · FastEndpoints · MediatR CQRS · EF Core
JSON body with ProblemDetails on error
Inner layers (SharedKernel, Core) have zero knowledge of outer layers. UseCases depends on Core + SharedKernel.
Infrastructure implements SharedKernel interfaces. Web depends on everything but is the composition root. Enforced by project references and 35+ Roslyn analyzers.
